title: pithecellobium tuerckheimii
intro: Pithecellobium tuerckheimii, also known as the Panama tree or monkey ladder, is a tropical tree native to Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pithecellobium tuerckheimii include treating fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
